response.overview: # English Translation  The story follows Dhia, who is engaged to Huzair, the son of Mr. Amran, and who eagerly awaits their first meeting. However, on the way to meet him, they are involved in an accident that results in the death of her father and Mr. Amran. Dhia never gets the chance to meet Huzair and is brought back to the home of her brother-in-law, Fayyad, who wants to take guardianship of Dhia. Unknown to anyone, Fayyad is the leader of a gang who has long harbored hatred for Dhia's family, despite his own sister, Tasha, being married to Fikri, Dhia's eldest brother. Tasha also feels resentful towards Dhia and constantly makes life harder for her, who is now all alone. Huzair returns from Europe only to face the tragic news about his father. He decides to stay in Malaysia and search for the girl he is engaged to. His search is detected by Tasha, who continues to plot to marry off her sister, Nadia, to Huzair.
response.title: Takdir Cinta Dhia
